title: The Montauk Monster
author: Local media/Internet
content: The theory claims a strange carcass found on a beach was the result of failed genetic experiments at nearby facilities.
action: Unidentified biological specimens are frequently linked to nearby high-security research.

title: The Denver Airport Time Capsule
author: Conspiracy theorists
content: The theory suggests the airport's dedication stone hides secrets or heralds a future globalist takeover.
action: Hidden symbols in public infrastructure provide a foundation for complex, long-term narratives.

title: The Great Pyramid Power Plant
author: Christopher Dunn
content: The theory posits that the Great Pyramid was not a tomb, but an ancient, massive resonant energy device.
action: Inexplicable architectural precision drives theories of lost, advanced technology.

title: The Denver Airport Gargoyles
author: Public interpretation
content: The theory argues that the airport's bizarre statues are intended to intimidate travelers and celebrate occult themes.
action: Unsettling public art is often interpreted as a signaling mechanism for elites.

title: The 1908 Siberian Blast
author: Various researchers
content: The theory suggests the Tunguska event was a targeted deployment of a prototype directed-energy weapon.
action: The absence of a crater allows for theories of precise, directed-energy deployment.
